sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الضِّيَافَةُ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ القِيَمِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَجَذَّرَتْ عَبْرَ العُصُورِ، حَيْثُ لَمْ تَكُنْ مُجَرَّدَ فِعْلٍ عَابِرٍ، بَلْ مَنْظُومَةً أَخْلَاقِيَّةً مُتَكَامِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Gostoljubivost se u arapskoj kulturi smatra osnovnim stubom društvenih vrijednosti koje su se ukorijenile kroz vijekove, jer ona nije bila samo prolazan čin, već integrisani moralni sistem.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality in Arab culture is considered a fundamental pillar of social values that have taken root across the ages, as it was not merely a transient act, but a complete ethical system.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ نَظَرْنَا إِلَى التَّارِيخِ القَدِيمِ، لَوَجَدْنَا أَنَّ إِكْرَامَ الضَّيْفِ كَانَ بِمَثَابَةِ مِعْيَارٍ لِلشَّرَفِ وَالمُرُوءَةِ، خَاصَّةً فِي البِيئَةِ الصَّحْرَاوِيَّةِ القَاسِيَةِ الَّتِي تَفْرِضُ التَّعَاوُنَ لِلْبَقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ako bismo pogledali drevnu historiju, vidjeli bismo da je počast gostu bila mjerilo časti i plemenitosti, posebno u surovom pustinjskom okruženju koje nameće saradnju radi opstanka.
sentences.translationEn: If we look at ancient history, we would find that honoring a guest served as a criterion for honor and chivalry, especially in the harsh desert environment that imposed cooperation for survival.

sentences.arabic: وَبِنَاءً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، فَقَدْ أُلْزِمَ المَرْءُ بِتَقْدِيمِ الحِمَايَةِ وَالغِذَاءِ لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَقْصِدُ بَيْتَهُ، مَهْمَا كَانَتْ صِلَةُ القَرَابَةِ بَيْنَهُمَا، إِيمَانًا بِأَنَّ الرِّزْقَ يَأْتِي مَعَ الضَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Na osnovu toga, pojedinac je bio obavezan pružiti zaštitu i hranu svakome ko posjeti njegov dom, bez obzira na rodbinsku vezu, vjerujući da nafaka dolazi s gostom.
sentences.translationEn: Based on this, one was obliged to provide protection and food to anyone who sought their home, regardless of kinship, believing that sustenance comes with the guest.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، ظَهَرَتْ مَفَاهِيمُ "القِرَى" وَ"ذَبِيحَةِ الضَّيْفِ" كَمُصْطَلَحَاتٍ تُعَبِّرُ عَنْ هَذَا السَّخَاءِ اللَّامَحْدُودِ.
sentences.translation: Otuda su se pojavili koncepti poput 'el-qira' (gozba) i 'žrtva za gosta' kao termini koji izražavaju ovu neograničenu darežljivost.
sentences.translationEn: Hence, concepts like 'al-qira' (hospitality feast) and 'the guest's sacrifice' emerged as terms expressing this limitless generosity.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي العَصْرِ الحَدِيثِ، لَا تَزَالُ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدُ حَاضِرَةً بِقُوَّةٍ فِي المَجَالِسِ العَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ يُسْتَقْبَلُ الزَّائِرُ بِرَائِحَةِ البَخُورِ الزَّكِيَّةِ وَالقَهْوَةِ السَّوْدَاءِ الَّتِي تُرْمِزُ إِلَى التَّرْحِيبِ الحَارِّ.
sentences.translation: U modernom dobu, ove tradicije su i dalje snažno prisutne u arapskim medžlisima, gdje se posjetilac dočekuje mirisom tamjana i crnom kafom koja simbolizira toplu dobrodošlicu.
sentences.translationEn: In the modern era, these traditions remain strongly present in Arab gatherings (majalis), where visitors are welcomed with the scent of incense and black coffee that symbolizes a warm welcome.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ التَّمْرُ جَنْبًا إِلَى جَنْبٍ مَعَ القَهْوَةِ، وَيُشْتَرَطُ فِي آدَابِهَا أَنْ يُصَبَّ الفِنْجَانُ بِاليَدِ اليُمْنَى تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ التَّقْدِيرِ، بَيْنَمَا يَهَزُّ الضَّيْفُ فِنْجَانَهُ دَلَالَةً عَلَى الِاكْتِفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme se služe uporedo s kafom, a bonton nalaže da se šoljica sipa desnom rukom u znak poštovanja, dok gost protrese šoljicu kao znak da mu je dovoljno.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are served alongside coffee, and etiquette requires that the cup be poured with the right hand as an expression of respect, while the guest shakes their cup to indicate they have had enough.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُعْتَبَرُ تَنَاوُلُ الطَّعَامِ مَعًا مِيثَاقًا غَيْرَ مَكْتُوبٍ لِلصَّدَاقَةِ وَالأَمَانِ بَيْنَ المُضِيفِ وَالزَّائِرِ.
sentences.translation: Zajedničko objedovanje smatra se nepisanim paktom prijateljstva i sigurnosti između domaćina i posjetioca.
sentences.translationEn: Eating together is considered an unwritten pact of friendship and security between the host and the visitor.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِفَاءَ بِالضَّيْفِ يَتَجَاوَزُ مُجَرَّدَ إِعْدَادِ المَائِدَةِ، لِيَصِلَ إِلَى بَشَاشَةِ الوَجْهِ وَحُسْنِ المَنْطِقِ اللَّذَيْنِ يُشْعِرَانِ الغَرِيبَ بِأَنَّهُ فَرْدٌ مِنَ العَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Slavljenje gosta prevazilazi puko pripremanje trpeze, dosežući do vedrine lica i lijepog govora koji čine da se stranac osjeća kao član porodice.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrating a guest goes beyond mere meal preparation to include a cheerful countenance and pleasant speech, which make the stranger feel like a member of the family.

sentences.arabic: وَيُشَدِّدُ العَرَبُ عَلَى أَنَّ "الضَّيْفَ أَمِيرٌ"، مِمَّا يَعْنِي أَنَّ لَهُ الحَقَّ فِي أَنْ يُخْدَمَ وَيُكَرَّمَ طِيلَةَ مُدَّةِ إِقَامَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi naglašavaju da je 'gost emir', što znači da ima pravo da bude služen i poštovan tokom cijelog boravka.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs emphasize that 'the guest is a prince,' meaning he has the right to be served and honored throughout his stay.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، تَبْقَى الضِّيَافَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ جِسْرًا لِلتَّوَاصُلِ الإِنْسَانِيِّ وَرِسَالَةَ مَحَبَّةٍ عَابِرَةً لِلْحُدُودِ، وَشَاهِدًا حَيًّا عَلَى نُبْلِ الأَخْلَاقِ الَّتِي تَتَوَارَثُهَا الأَجْيَالُ بِكُلِّ فَخْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, arapska gostoljubivost ostaje most ljudske komunikacije i poruka ljubavi koja prelazi granice, te živi svjedok plemenitog morala koji generacije s ponosom nasljeđuju.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, Arab hospitality remains a bridge for human communication and a message of love that transcends borders, and a living witness to the noble morals inherited by generations with pride.
